title: No Mo' Spiders!
description: No Mo' Spiders aka Mo' Komodo is a simple resource pack that replaces the spiders of Minecraft, with reptiles!
body: This resource pack requires Optifine! No Mo' Spiders aka Mo' Komodo is a simple resource pack that replaces the spiders of Minecraft, with reptiles! No longer does arachnophobia have to hinder someone's enjoyment of this lovely block game :)
